meaning: n.[常pl.] 工具,器具vt.贯彻,实现v.执行
examples: Leadership is about the ability to implement change.
The government promised to implement a new system to control financial loan institutions.
Now, let me scramble for my implement here.
Interpret guidelines and take action to implement necessary changes to address issues at hand.
Doubtless, the next president will implement policies and take credit for helping this inevitable transformation.
